# Viper Runtime Runtime Reference

[Back to the runtime reference index](README.md)

## Classes

<a id="viper-runtime-unsafe"></a>
### `Viper.Runtime.Unsafe`

Provides Unsafe functionality for low-level runtime services.

`Viper.Runtime.Unsafe` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes operations including `Retain`,
`Release`, `RetainStr`, `ReleaseStr`.

#### Methods

|---|---|---|

| <a id="viper-runtime-unsafe-retainstr"></a>`RetainStr` | `void(str)` | `Viper.Runtime.Unsafe.RetainStr` |
| <a id="viper-runtime-unsafe-releasestr"></a>`ReleaseStr` | `i64(str)` | `Viper.Runtime.Unsafe.ReleaseStr` |
| <a id="viper-runtime-unsafe-valuetype"></a>`ValueType` | `obj(i64)` | `Viper.Runtime.Unsafe.ValueType` |

<a id="viper-runtime-gc"></a>
### `Viper.Runtime.GC`

Provides GC functionality for low-level runtime services.

`Viper.Runtime.GC` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes operations including `Collect`,
`TrackedCount`, `TotalCollected`, `PassCount`.

#### Methods

| Method | Signature | Runtime target |
|---|---|---|
| <a id="viper-runtime-gc-collect"></a>`Collect` | `i64()` | `Viper.Runtime.GC.Collect` |

| <a id="viper-runtime-gc-totalcollected"></a>`TotalCollected` | `i64()` | `Viper.Runtime.GC.TotalCollected` |
| <a id="viper-runtime-gc-passcount"></a>`PassCount` | `i64()` | `Viper.Runtime.GC.PassCount` |

| <a id="viper-runtime-gc-getthreshold"></a>`GetThreshold` | `i64()` | `Viper.Runtime.GC.GetThreshold` |
